deep_caverns.name: Deep Caverns
deep_caverns.description: The Deep Caverns are a confusing area for those unfamiliar with them. To pass through this area to reach a new location you must first complete 10 `!enc wm-cave`. Once completed for a specific exit, it need not be repeated and you can lead others who accompany you on future travels.

mistcloak_mountain.name: Mistcloak Mountain
mistcloak_mountain.description:
This is an **Extreme Cold** area where the temperature is 0F or lower. You need Cold Weather Clothing or another appropriate item or feature to travel through this area. If you have resistance or immunity to Cold Damage this also applies.
If instead you brave the elements without you must make a DC 10 Con Save for every enc or gather you do in this area or suffer a level of Exhaustion.

mistcloak_mountain_caves.name: Mistcloak Mountain Caves
mistcloak_mountain_caves.description: The Mistcloak Mountain Caves are a confusing area for those unfamiliar with them. To pass through this area to reach a new location you must first complete 5 `!enc wm-cave`. Once completed for a specific exit, it need not be repeated and you can lead others who accompany you on future travels.
